description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named attiny4313 that triggers on push and pull request target events to the master branch, specifically for changes to src, examples, ci, .github/workflows, CMakeLists.txt, platformio.ini, library.json, and library.properties. The workflow uses a build job defined in a reusable template, passing args attiny4313 --examples Blink,Apa102 to the template.
